nodes.name: River tyrannulet
nodes.summary: River tyrannulet（River tyrannulet，学名 Serpophaga hypoleuca），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联10个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 亞馬遜盆地
nodes.summary: 亞馬遜盆地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联130种鸟类，包括灰穴䳍、小嘴穴䳍、绿翅雁等130种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: pallida is found in Brazil, along the lower Amazon and the lower reaches of the Tapajós and Tocantins rivers. The river tyrannulet inhabits low-stature and sparse early-successional scrub on river islands and the "mainland" river edges

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In eastern Colombia and western Venezuela it occurs in scrubby and thorny areas along watercourses in the Llanos

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The river tyrannulet is found in the Amazon Basin along four major river wildlife corridors; also two rivers in Venezuela, including the lower Orinoco
